data.title: CLOU Unveils Aqua-C3.0 Ultra High-Density Energy Storage System at Solar & Storage Live Africa
data.description: In Johannesburg on March 26, 2026, CLOU Electronics introduced Aqua-C3.0 Ultra, a cutting-edge energy storage solution at Solar & Storage Live Africa. This system boasts a height of over 10 feet and liquid cooling for DC/AC. It includes 587 Ah cells and is presented in two variations.

data.title: US lawmaker aims to ban staff from trading on prediction markets due to insider trading fears and misuse of information.
data.description: Congress is taking steps to increase regulation of prediction markets due to growing worries about insider trading and improper use of confidential information.

data.title: Bitcoin's slow quantum-resistance progress could benefit Ethereum, says Nic Carter, emphasizing disparities.
data.description: According to crypto entrepreneur Nic Carter, Bitcoin developers are being criticized for not focusing on making the cryptocurrency quantum-resistant as Ethereum developers have done. Carter claims that there is a significant disparity between the two cryptocurrencies in terms of readiness for quantum computing, suggesting that Bitcoin developers are not adequately addressing this issue.

data.title: Swan Bitcoin aims to subpoena Cantor Fitzgerald and ex-CEO over staff dispute involving failed Tether mining venture.
data.description: Howard Lutnick is believed to have had knowledge of Swan Bitcoin's unsuccessful Tether mining venture. Subsequently, employees reportedly took documents, quit their positions, and established a competing company.

data.title: Selling Crypto To Pay Taxes? Coinbase Says There's Another Option, But X Users Identify These Pitfalls
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. announced that users can now borrow USDC against their crypto assets to pay taxes without selling them due to potential capital gains taxes. The company emphasized that selling cryptocurrencies could lead to a cycle of selling more to cover new taxes as taxes are only applicable when gains are realized, not for capital losses. Users have the option to collateralize Bitcoin and Ethereum to obtain USDC loans, with the loan not considered a taxable event. They can later convert USDC into dollars to fulfill their tax obligations. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sungrow Powers Solar & Storage Live Johannesburg with Next-Generation C&I and Utility Solutions
data.description: Sungrow, a top global provider of PV inverters and energy storage systems, recently took part in Solar & Storage Live Johannesburg 2026. At the event, Sungrow highlighted its integrated solar and storage solutions tailored to meet the changing demands of the energy sector. This initiative aims to address the growing need for reliable and efficient energy solutions in the region. Sungrow's participation in the event signifies its commitment to innovation and sustainability in the industry, as it continues to demonstrate its expertise in delivering cutting-edge technology to consumers.

data.title: Nvidia faces class action lawsuit for alleged revenue discrepancies from crypto mining. Stock price affected. Case progresses.
data.description: The semiconductor company did not contest allegations that its disclosures regarding cryptocurrency had an impact on its stock value. As a result, the lawsuit will proceed.

data.title: Hytera Introduces PNC660 450MHz: New Device Certified for Power and Energy Mission-Critical Networks
data.description: Hytera introduced the PNC660 450MHz MCX Smart Device at the Mobile World Congress in Barcelona, Spain. This new device is designed for private 450MHz LTE and 5G networks and is equipped with advanced mission-critical features.

data.title: H2O.ai and CTC Global Singapore Have Partnered Together To Democratize Agentic AI Across APAC
data.description: In Singapore, H2O.ai, a prominent open-source AI platform company, has joined forces with CTC Global Singapore, a reputable technology integrator in the Asia Pacific region. The collaboration aims to expedite enterprise AI adoption in the area and was solidified at a signing event in Singapore. This milestone signifies the commitment to provide reliable Agentic AI solutions for users in secure and regulated settings. This partnership is crucial in meeting the increasing demand for trusted AI solutions in the region.

data.title: AFSP-Illinois Outlines Legislative Priorities During 2026 Advocacy Day
data.description: In Springfield, Illinois, on March 26, 2026, crucial suicide-prevention bills, along with funding for the Illinois Suicide Prevention Alliance, the 988 Continuum of Care program, and ensuring mental health care parity, are at the forefront of discussions. The Illinois Chapter of the American Foundation for Suicide Prevention (AFSP) is advocating for these important issues.

data.title: India Smart Kitchen Appliances Market to Reach USD 2.99 Billion by 2032, Driven by Rising Smart Home Adoption, Says MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recent market research report from MarkNtel Advisors reveals that the Smart Kitchen Appliances Market in India is expected to experience a substantial growth, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 25% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is attributed to the rising adoption of smart kitchen appliances in the country.

data.title: Liberty Energy Inc. Announces Pricing of Upsized $475.0 Million Convertible Senior Notes Offering
data.description: Denver-based Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) unveiled the pricing and sale of $475.0 million in total principal amount of 0.00% convertible senior notes expiring in 2032. This move was part of a private offering targeted at qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. The company has given initial purchasers the option to acquire additional notes.

data.title: Australia's central bank supports tokenization after pilot shows a $16.7 billion potential benefit. Assistant Governor Brad Jones touts it as revolutionary.
data.description: Brad Jones, Assistant Governor of the Reserve Bank of Australia, stated that tokenized finance and associated infrastructure enhancements will bring about a "revolutionary" change.

data.title: Coast Wealth Management Expands Fiduciary Retirement Planning Services Nationwide
data.description: A firm based in Myrtle Beach offers assistance to pre-retirees and retirees in creating organized retirement income plans and overseeing investments in South Carolina and throughout the country. Coast Wealth Management, operating as an independent and fee-based wealth management company in Myrtle Beach, stated on March 26, 2026, that they specialize in guiding individuals towards their retirement goals.

data.title: No Installation, hassle free: iGarden Reinvents the Swim Jet X Series
data.description: On March 26, 2026, iGarden unveiled the Swim Jet X Series, debuting the first-of-its-kind wireless, battery-operated, no-installation-needed, and fully portable counter current pool system. This innovative product is targeted at the vast number of homeowners worldwide.

data.title: US judge dismisses crypto case over money transmission laws, leaving the fate of non-custodial crypto developers uncertain.
data.description: The ruling does not clarify if creators of non-custodial cryptocurrency platforms are required to adhere to federal regulations governing money transmission.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF Gets Official Listing Announcement By NYSE: Analyst Says This 'Typically' Means Launch Imminent
data.description: The NYSE Arca has approved Morgan Stanley's application to list shares of a spot Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF) under the ticker MSBT. This news comes after the exchange certified its approval for the "listing and registration" of the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust. Bloomberg senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas anticipates an imminent launch of the ETF following this announcement. The official listing announcement from NYSE indicates that the launch is forthcoming. Morgan Stanley filed an amended S-1 filing for the new product. For more information, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Comcast Technology Solutions Selected by Altibox for Centralized Video Management Across Norway and Denmark
data.description: CTS has introduced its Cloud Video Platform to offer back-end video management and publishing services for Altibox TV on set-top boxes and connected devices. The deployment aims to enhance operations and ensure the efficient delivery of premium on-demand content from various TV and streaming services to subscribers in Scandinavia. This initiative in Denver will benefit subscribers and improve their viewing experience.

data.title: SuperAI 2026 Returns to Singapore as the World's AI Powers Converge on Neutral Ground
data.description: The biggest artificial intelligence (AI) conference in Asia will be taking place at Marina Bay Sands in Singapore on June 10-11, attracting over 10,000 participants. The event has already secured the participation of tech giants like Google, AWS, Arm, Red Hat, and Snowflake. This gathering aims to bring together industry leaders, innovators, and AI enthusiasts to share insights and discuss the latest trends in AI technology.

data.title: Moving average interaction systematized for trading decisions; 2 buy & sell points derived, reducing risk to operable scenarios.
data.description: The article discusses the shift from analyzing moving averages for interaction classification to making actionable trading decisions. It introduces a comprehensive classification-response system that reduces market risk to a limited number of manageable scenarios. In a dual moving average setup, it identifies two ideal buy points and two symmetric sell points, creating a fully operational trading cycle. The system aims to streamline the process and facilitate strategic decision-making in trading.
